sentences.text: The Olympic Games, which are held every four years, bring together athletes from all over the world.
sentences.translation_zh: 每四年举办一次的奥运会汇集了来自世界各地的运动员。
sentences.translation_vi: The Van Hoi Olympic, duoc to chuc bon nam mot lan, quy tu cac van dong vien tu khap noi tren the gioi.

sentences.text: If our team wins the semifinal match tonight, they will play in the championship game next Saturday.
sentences.translation_zh: 如果我们的队伍今晚赢得半决赛，他们将在下周六参加冠军赛。
sentences.translation_vi: Neu doi cua chung toi thang tran ban ket toi nay, ho se thi dau trong tran chung ket vao thu Bay tuan toi.

sentences.text: The referee was criticized because he made several controversial decisions during the match.
sentences.translation_zh: 裁判受到了批评，因为他在比赛中做出了几个有争议的决定。
sentences.translation_vi: Trong tai bi chi trich vi ong ay da dua ra nhieu quyet dinh gay tranh cai trong tran dau.

sentences.text: Although the home team was expected to win easily, the visitors put up a surprisingly strong fight.
sentences.translation_zh: 虽然主队被预期轻松获胜，但客队出人意料地顽强抵抗。
sentences.translation_vi: Mac du doi nha duoc ky vong se thang de dang, nhung doi khach da chien dau manh me bat ngo.

sentences.text: The marathon runner who crossed the finish line first had been training for over three years.
sentences.translation_zh: 第一个冲过终点线的马拉松选手已经训练了三年多。
sentences.translation_vi: Van dong vien marathon nguoi vuot qua vach dich dau tien da tap luyen hon ba nam.

sentences.text: The coach announced that several players would be rested for the upcoming tournament.
sentences.translation_zh: 教练宣布几名球员将为即将到来的锦标赛休息。
sentences.translation_vi: Huan luyen vien thong bao rang mot so cau thu se duoc nghi ngoi cho giai dau sap toi.

sentences.text: Fans were so excited about the victory that they celebrated in the streets until early morning.
sentences.translation_zh: 球迷们对胜利如此兴奋，以至于他们在街上庆祝到凌晨。
sentences.translation_vi: Nguoi ham mo phan khich ve chien thang den noi ho an mung tren duong pho den sang som.

sentences.text: The stadium was built to hold eighty thousand spectators, but it is rarely filled to capacity.
sentences.translation_zh: 这座体育场建造时可容纳八万名观众，但很少满员。
sentences.translation_vi: San van dong duoc xay de chua tam muoi nghin khan gia, nhung it khi day suc chua.

sentences.text: When the goalkeeper saved the penalty kick, the entire crowd stood up and cheered loudly.
sentences.translation_zh: 当守门员扑出点球时，全场观众起立大声欢呼。
sentences.translation_vi: Khi thu mon can phat den, toan bo khan gia dung day va co vu vang doi.

sentences.text: The World Cup is the most watched sporting event in the world, attracting billions of viewers.
sentences.translation_zh: 世界杯是世界上收视率最高的体育赛事，吸引了数十亿观众。
sentences.translation_vi: World Cup la su kien the thao duoc xem nhieu nhat tren the gioi, thu hut hang ty nguoi xem.

sentences.text: Professional athletes must maintain strict diets and training schedules if they want to remain competitive.
sentences.translation_zh: 职业运动员如果想要保持竞争力，就必须保持严格的饮食和训练计划。
sentences.translation_vi: Cac van dong vien chuyen nghiep phai duy tri che do an uong va lich tap luyen nghiem ngat neu ho muon duy tri suc canh tranh.

sentences.text: The tennis player injured her knee during the first set, so she had to withdraw from the competition.
sentences.translation_zh: 这位网球运动员在第一盘中膝盖受伤，所以她不得不退出比赛。
sentences.translation_vi: Van dong vien tennis bi chan thuong dau goi trong set dau tien, nen co ay phai bo cuoc thi dau.

sentences.text: Swimming and gymnastics are the sports that receive the most attention during the Summer Olympics.
sentences.translation_zh: 游泳和体操是夏季奥运会期间最受关注的运动。
sentences.translation_vi: Boi loi va the duc dung cu la nhung mon the thao nhan duoc nhieu su chu y nhat trong Olympic Mua He.

sentences.text: It has been reported that the next major international sports event will take place in Tokyo.
sentences.translation_zh: 据报道，下一个重大国际体育赛事将在东京举行。
sentences.translation_vi: Da co bao cao rang su kien the thao quoc te lon tiep theo se dien ra tai Tokyo.

sentences.text: Because the weather forecast predicted heavy rain, the outdoor athletics competition was postponed until next week.
sentences.translation_zh: 因为天气预报预测有大雨，户外田径比赛被推迟到下周。
sentences.translation_vi: Vi du bao thoi tiet du doan mua lon, cuoc thi dien kinh ngoai troi da bi hoan lai den tuan sau.
